query_intent: For low-priced items (0.99-1.49), compare net catalog sales before and after 2001-04-02 by warehouse state and item over a +/-30-day window, netting out refunded cash.

dag_nodes.intent: Join catalog sales with optional returns, warehouse, item, and date; split net sales into before/after buckets with CASE expressions; then aggregate by warehouse state and item id.
